features: 🌟 Luxury Red Gift Tags – Pack of 20 premium oval gift tags featuring 10 glitter and 10 foil designs for an elegant, festive touch in rich red tones.
🎀 Includes Pre-Attached Red String – Each tag measures 10.5 x 6 cm and comes with red string for effortless attachment.
🎁 Perfect for Every Occasion – Ideal for Christmas, weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, and corporate gifting.
📜 Premium Cardstock – Made from sturdy, durable material, ensuring a long-lasting and high-quality appearance.
🌍 Eco-Friendly Packaging – Thoughtfully packaged in a widely recyclable cardboard box, making it a sustainable choice.
description: 🎁 Elegant & Versatile Red Gift Tags for Every Occasion Enhance your gift wrapping with this pack of 20 luxury red oval gift tags, featuring 10 glitter and 10 foil designs. Designed for Christmas, weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, and corporate gifting, these stylish tags provide the perfect finishing touch to any present. ✨ Key Features: ✔️ Premium Quality & Design – A pack of 20 luxury oval gift tags in stunning red, featuring 10 glitter tags for sparkle and 10 foil tags for a sleek, elegant look. ✔️ Perfect Size & Ready to Use – Each tag measures 10.5 x 6 cm and comes with a pre-attached red string, making it easy to attach to any gift. ✔️ Ideal for All Special Occasions – Perfect for Christmas, weddings, birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries, corporate gifting, and more. Their timeless design complements any wrapping paper or gift bag. ✔️ Durable & High-Quality Material – Made from sturdy, premium cardstock, these tags are long-lasting and maintain their shape and elegance even with frequent handling. ✔️ Eco-Friendly & Sustainable Packaging – Thoughtfully packaged in a widely recyclable cardboard box, offering a greener alternative for environmentally conscious shoppers. Upgrade your gift-wrapping with these stylish and durable red gift tags – the perfect luxury addition to any special celebration!
